messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0078",
  "title": "运营、商业化与社区",
  "page_index": 30,
  "page_range": "30"
}

Section text:
运营、商业化与社区

message.content: This section functions solely as a structural heading indicating coverage of three core topics: operational management, commercialization/monetization strategies, and community development/engagement. Based on the provided text, it contains no specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. It can only answer high-level navigational questions about where the document addresses operations, revenue models, and community initiatives, but lacks substantive factual content for detailed retrieval.
